problem_solved: Millions of Americans face food insecurity, but healthcare providers lack systematic ways to connect patients to food assistance
solution_description: Nation's largest domestic hunger-relief organization with network of 200+ food banks. Partners with healthcare organizations for food insecurity screening and referrals. Provides Food Security Solutions including produce prescriptions and food pharmacy programs. Integrates with SDOH platforms for healthcare referrals
traction_signals: Food pharmacy and produce prescription programs
notes: Nonprofit food security organization with healthcare partnerships. Medium Varden fit - nonprofit model limits commercial opportunity. Important SDOH partner for food insecurity. Integrates with Findhelp/Unite Us for referrals
